data.name: NTR Loop
data.detailed_description:
This short story is about Syrius, an adventurer who had to pay a steep price for insulting the Great Witch on his wedding day with his beloved Arlene.

He is sent back in time to relive his first "adventure," a tedious affair that displeases the Great Witch. Soon, she'll turn this boring story into one to her liking.

Syrius will relive this story, seeing Arlene become a whole new person. Will this turn him against her? Or will his love endure the Witch's intentions?


The story is a kinetic novel that allows you to move freely around the town. As a player, you can complete the assigned tasks without any impediment, but you can also look around and see what Arlene is up to.

As the story becomes more corrupted, you can visit her multiple times and see how things progress.


  • A NTR story (Not avoidable!)
  • Over 50 scenes!
  • Transparent or solid obstacles

data.short_description: This story is about Syrius and his girlfriend, Arlene, who are sent back in time to relieve their first adventure. An offended and bored Witch will immensely enjoy corrupting this love story.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher.
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
